name: dart_ipfs
desc: Production-ready IPFS (InterPlanetary File System) implementation in Dart.

name: BitswapConfig
desc:
Configuration for the Bitswap protocol, including the optional HTTP
gateway fallback used when P2P block exchange fails.

name: BitswapConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a BitswapConfig from a JSON map.

name: BitswapConfig.new
desc: Creates a new BitswapConfig.

name: allowPrivateGateways
desc: Whether private/loopback gateway URLs (e.g. 127.0.0.1) are allowed.

name: enableHttpFallback
desc: Whether the HTTP gateway fallback is enabled.

name: httpFallbackGateways
desc: Ordered list of HTTP gateway base URLs to use as a fallback.

name: httpTimeout
desc: Timeout applied to each HTTP fallback request.

name: maxConcurrentRequests
desc: Maximum number of concurrent P2P Bitswap requests.

name: maxHttpBlockSize
desc: Maximum allowed HTTP block response size in bytes.

name: p2pTimeout
desc: Timeout applied to each P2P Bitswap request attempt.

name: toJson
desc: Converts this configuration to a JSON map.

name: verifyHttpBlocks
desc: Whether to verify HTTP-fetched blocks against their CID.

name: CarException
desc: Base class for CAR parsing errors.

name: CarException.new
desc: Creates a CarException with the given message.

name: message
desc: Human-readable error description.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: CarHeader
desc: Immutable CAR file header.

name: CarHeader.new
desc: Creates a CarHeader with the given version and roots.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: roots
desc: The root CIDs of the archive.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: version
desc: The CAR format version (1 or 2).

name: CarHeaderException
desc: Thrown when a CAR header is malformed or violates the CAR specification.

name: CarHeaderException.new
desc: Creates a CarHeaderException with the given message.

name: CarIndexException
desc: Thrown when a CAR index is malformed or inconsistent with the data payload.

name: CarIndexException.new
desc: Creates a CarIndexException with the given message.

name: CarReader
desc: Streaming/iterable reader for CAR v1 and v2 archives.

name: CarReader.fromBytes
desc: Parses a CAR archive from the given byte data.

name: CarReader.fromStream
desc: Parses a CAR archive from a stream of byte chunks.

name: findCID
desc:
Returns the byte offset of the section containing cid, or null if not
present.

name: header
desc: The decoded CAR header.

name: sections
desc: Returns a stream that yields each CarSection in file order.

name: CarSection
desc: A single CID/block section within a CAR archive.

name: CarSection.new
desc: Creates a CarSection with the given cid and bytes.

name: bytes
desc: The raw block bytes of this section.

name: cid
desc: The CID of this section.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: serializedSize
desc: The on-wire size of this section, including the varint length prefix.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: CarSectionException
desc: Thrown when a CAR section is malformed or truncated.

name: CarSectionException.new
desc: Creates a CarSectionException with the given message.

name: CarV2Exception
desc: Thrown when a CAR v2 pragma or header is invalid.

name: CarV2Exception.new
desc: Creates a CarV2Exception with the given message.

name: CarWriter
desc: Append-only writer for CAR v1 and v2 archives.

name: CarWriter.new
desc: Creates a writer for a CAR archive with the given roots.

name: close
desc: Emits the complete file as bytes.

name: closeStream
desc: Emits the complete file as a stream of byte chunks.

name: index
desc: Whether to build an index (CAR v2 only).

name: maxBlockSize
desc: Maximum allowed block size in bytes.

name: multihashIndex
desc:
Whether the index should be MultihashIndexSorted (0x0401) instead of
IndexSorted (0x0400).

name: roots
desc: The root CIDs of the CAR.

name: v2
desc: Whether to write a CAR v2 file.

name: write
desc: Writes a single section.

name: CircuitRelayConfig
desc: Configuration for the circuit relay client.

name: CircuitRelayConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a CircuitRelayConfig from a JSON map.

name: CircuitRelayConfig.new
desc: Creates a new CircuitRelayConfig.

name: enabled
desc: Whether circuit relay support is enabled.

name: maxCircuits
desc: Maximum number of concurrent relayed circuits.

name: reservationRefreshInterval
desc: Interval before a reservation expires at which to refresh it.

name: reservationTimeout
desc: Timeout for reservation and CONNECT requests.

name: staticRelays
desc: Static relay multiaddresses to use when no dynamic relay is available.

name: toJson
desc: Converts this configuration to a JSON map.

name: DHTConfig
desc: Configuration options for the DHT (Distributed Hash Table)

name: DHTConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a DHTConfig from JSON.

name: DHTConfig.new
desc: Creates a new DHTConfig with default Kademlia settings.

name: alpha
desc: Number of parallel lookups (alpha value in Kademlia).

name: bucketSize
desc: Size of k-buckets.

name: enableProviderRecording
desc: Whether to enable provider recording.

name: enableValueStorage
desc: Whether to enable value storage.

name: maxProvidersPerKey
desc: Maximum number of providers to store per key.

name: maxRecordsPerQuery
desc: Maximum number of records to return per query.

name: protocolId
desc: Protocol identifier for DHT.

name: reproviderBatchSize
desc: Maximum number of CIDs to announce in a single batch.

name: reproviderConcurrency
desc: Maximum number of concurrent in-flight provide announcements.

name: reproviderEnabled
desc: Whether the periodic reprovider service is enabled.

name: reproviderInterval
desc: Interval between automatic reprovide runs.

name: reproviderStrategy
desc:
Reprovide strategy name (e.g. pinned, roots, all, pinned+mfs,
unique, entities).

name: reproviderSweepOptimization
desc: Whether to enable XOR-ordered proximity grouping for reprovides.

name: requestTimeout
desc: Time to wait before considering a request as failed.

name: toJson
desc: Converts the config to JSON.

name: validateProviderRecords
desc:
Whether to validate incoming provider records for address sanity and
freshness before trusting them.

name: GatewayConfig
desc: Configuration for the IPFS HTTP Gateway.

name: GatewayConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a GatewayConfig from a JSON map.

name: GatewayConfig.new
desc: Creates a new GatewayConfig.

name: address
desc: The address the gateway listens on.

name: autoTls
desc:
Whether to obtain and renew certificates automatically via ACME.
Off by default and requires explicit autoTlsAcceptTos.

name: autoTlsAcceptTos
desc:
Whether the operator has accepted the ACME provider's terms of service.
AutoTLS refuses to run when this is false.

name: autoTlsAccountKeyPath
desc: Filesystem path to the ACME account key for AutoTLS.

name: autoTlsCertificatePath
desc: Filesystem path to the AutoTLS certificate.

name: autoTlsDomain
desc: Primary domain for the ACME certificate.

name: autoTlsEmail
desc: Contact email for the ACME account.

name: autoTlsPrivateKeyPath
desc: Filesystem path to the AutoTLS private key.

name: autoTlsProvider
desc: ACME provider name (e.g. letsencrypt, zerossl).

name: autoTlsRenewalThresholdDays
desc: Number of days before certificate expiration to trigger renewal.

name: autoTlsSANs
desc: Additional subject alternative names for the ACME certificate.

name: cacheSize
desc: The maximum size of the gateway cache in bytes.

name: certificatePassword
desc:
Optional password for the encrypted private key file.
Never log this value.

name: certificatePath
desc: Filesystem path to the PEM-encoded TLS certificate.

name: corsOrigins
desc: Allowed CORS origins for the HTTP gateway.

name: enableCache
desc: Whether to enable caching for gateway responses.

name: enableSubdomainGateway
desc: Whether subdomain gateway support is enabled.

name: enableTls
desc: Whether to terminate TLS for HTTPS and WSS gateway traffic.

name: enabled
desc: Whether the gateway is enabled.

name: gatewayDomain
desc:
The configured gateway domain for subdomain requests (e.g. ipfs.example.com).
When null, only *.ipfs.localhost and *.ipns.localhost subdomains are
supported.

name: port
desc: The port the gateway listens on.

name: privateKeyPath
desc: Filesystem path to the PEM-encoded TLS private key.

name: redirectHttpToHttps
desc:
Whether the plain HTTP port should redirect all requests to HTTPS.
Only meaningful when enableTls is true.

name: subdomainDNSLinkResolver
desc: Whether DNSLink resolution is enabled for .ipns subdomains.

name: subdomainTLSRedirect
desc:
Whether to redirect HTTP subdomain requests to HTTPS.
Never enabled for localhost or 127.0.0.1 to avoid redirect loops.

name: tlsPort
desc: The port the TLS server listens on.

name: toJson
desc: Converts this configuration to a JSON map.

name: writable
desc: Whether the gateway is writable (allows POST/PUT).

name: GatewayMode
desc: Modes for retrieving content via the IPFSNode.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: GraphsyncConfig
desc: Configuration for the Graphsync protocol handler.

name: GraphsyncConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a GraphsyncConfig from a JSON map.

name: GraphsyncConfig.new
desc: Creates a GraphsyncConfig with the given settings.

name: defaultMaxBlocks
desc: Default maximum number of blocks returned for a single request.

name: defaultMaxBytes
desc: Default maximum number of bytes returned for a single request.

name: defaultMaxDepth
desc: Default maximum traversal depth for a Graphsync request.

name: enabled
desc: Whether Graphsync is enabled on this node.

name: fallBackToBitswap
desc: Whether to fall back to Bitswap when a requested block is not local.

name: toJson
desc: Converts this configuration to a JSON map.

name: IPFS
desc: Main entry point for the IPFS (InterPlanetary File System) implementation.

name: addDirectory
desc: Adds a directory to IPFS.

name: addFile
desc: Adds a file to the IPFS network from its raw data.

name: create
desc: Creates a new IPFS node.

name: exportCAR
desc: Exports a CAR file for the given CID.

name: findProviders
desc: Finds providers for a CID.

name: get
desc: Gets the content of a file or directory from IPFS.

name: importCAR
desc: Imports a CAR file.

name: ls
desc: Lists the contents of a directory in IPFS.

name: onNewContent
desc: Stream of new content CIDs added to the node.

name: peerID
desc: Gets the peer ID of the IPFS node.

name: pin
desc: Pins a CID to prevent it from being garbage collected.

name: publish
desc: Publishes a message to a PubSub topic.

name: publishIPNS
desc: Publishes an IPNS record.

name: requestBlock
desc: Requests a block from the network using Bitswap.

name: resolveDNSLink
desc: Resolves a DNSLink to its corresponding CID.

name: resolveIPNS
desc: Resolves an IPNS name to its corresponding CID.

name: start
desc: Starts the IPFS node.

name: stats
desc: Gets the node's statistics.

name: stop
desc: Stops the IPFS node.

name: subscribe
desc: Subscribes to a PubSub topic.

name: unpin
desc: Unpins a CID.

name: IPFSConfig
desc: Configuration for an IPFS node.

name: IPFSConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates configuration from JSON

name: IPFSConfig.new
desc: Creates a new IPFSConfig with the specified options.

name: IPFSConfig.withDefaults
desc: Creates a new IPFSConfig with a generated nodeId

name: bitswap
desc: Bitswap protocol configuration.

name: blockStorePath
desc: Path to the blockstore.

name: customConfig
desc: Key-value pair for custom configuration options.

name: dataPath
desc: The base path for node data.

name: datastorePath
desc: Path to the datastore.

name: debug
desc: Enable debug mode.

name: defaultBandwidthQuota
desc: Default bandwidth quota in bytes.

name: dht
desc: Distributed Hash Table configuration.

name: enableCircuitRelay
desc: Enable Circuit Relay support.

name: enableContentRouting
desc: Enable content routing.

name: enableDHT
desc: Enable DHT protocols.

name: enableDNSLinkResolution
desc: Enable DNSLink resolution.

name: enableGraphsync
desc: Enable Graphsync protocol.

name: enableIPLD
desc: Enable IPLD support.

name: enableIpnsPubSub
desc: Enable IPNS PubSub notifications (requires a Gossipsub-compliant handler).

name: enableLibp2pBridge
desc: Whether to enable the libp2p bridge transport.

name: enableLogging
desc: Enable system-wide logging.

name: enableMetrics
desc: Enable metrics collection.

name: enablePubSub
desc: Enable PubSub protocols.

name: enableQuotaManagement
desc: Enable bandwidth quota management.

name: enableRPC
desc: Enable the RPC API server.

name: enableStructuredLogging
desc: Enable structured (JSON) logging.

name: fromFile
desc: Loads configuration from a JSON or YAML file.

name: garbageCollectionEnabled
desc: Enable automatic garbage collection.

name: garbageCollectionInterval
desc: Interval for garbage collection.

name: gateway
desc: HTTP Gateway configuration.

name: graphsync
desc: Graphsync protocol configuration.

name: ipnsCacheSize
desc: The size of the IPNS resolution cache.

name: keystore
desc: The keystore for managing keys.

name: keystorePath
desc: Path to the keystore.

name: libp2pIdentitySeed
desc: Optional seed for persistent libp2p identity.

name: libp2pListenAddress
desc: The listen address for the libp2p bridge.

name: logLevel
desc: The logging level (e.g., 'info', 'debug', 'error').

name: maxConcurrentBitswapRequests
desc: Maximum concurrent bitswap requests.

name: maxSelectorDepth
desc: Maximum recursion depth for IPLD selector execution.

name: maxSelectorNodes
desc: Maximum number of nodes to visit during IPLD selector execution.

name: metrics
desc: Metrics collection configuration.

name: network
desc: Detailed network configuration.

name: nodeId
desc: The unique node identifier.

name: offline
desc: Run node in offline mode.

name: privateNetworkPsk
desc: The 32-byte pre-shared key loaded from swarmKeyPath.

name: security
desc: Security and identity configuration.

name: storage
desc: Storage and datastore configuration.

name: swarmKeyPath
desc: Optional path to a libp2p private-network swarm key file.

name: toJson
desc: Converts to JSON representation.

name: verboseLogging
desc: Enable verbose logging.

name: IPFSNode
desc: The main IPFS node implementation.

name: IPFSNode.fromContainer
desc: Creates an IPFSNode from a pre-configured service container.

name: addDirectory
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the CID of the added directoryContent.

name: addFile
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the CID of the added file data.

name: addFileStream
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the CID of the added file from dataStream.

name: addresses
desc: Returns a List of multiaddresses this node is listening on.

name: bandwidthIn
desc: Returns total bytes received by the P2P node since it started.

name: bandwidthMetrics
desc: Returns a Stream of bandwidth metrics as a Map.

name: bandwidthOut
desc: Returns total bytes sent by the P2P node since it started.

name: bitswap
desc: Returns the BitswapHandler instance, or null if not registered.

name: blockStore
desc: Returns the underlying BlockStore.

name: cat
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the raw content associated with the given cid.

name: connectToPeer
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the node manually connects to a peer using its multiaddr.

name: connectedPeers
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to a List of currently connected peer IDs.

name: create
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to an IPFSNode built from the config.

name: datastore
desc: Returns the underlying Datastore.

name: denylistService
desc: Returns the DenylistService instance, or null if not registered.

name: dhtClient
desc: Returns the DHTClient for peer and content discovery.

name: dhtHandler
desc: Returns the DHTHandler instance, or null if not registered.

name: dhtPeerCount
desc: Returns the number of peers currently in the Kademlia DHT routing table.

name: disconnectFromPeer
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the node gracefully disconnects from a peer identified by peerIdOrAddr.

name: exportCAR
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the CAR file bytes for the given cid.

name: findProviders
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to a List of multiaddresses for providers of the given cid.

name: get
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the content of a file or directory associated with the given cid.

name: getHealthStatus
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to a health status map for all subsystems.

name: importCAR
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the given CAR (Content Addressable Archive) file carFile is imported.

name: ipns
desc: Returns the IPNSHandler instance, or null if not registered.

name: isRunning
desc: Whether the node is currently running.

name: ls
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to a List of Links representing the contents of an IPFS directory.

name: metricsCollector
desc: Returns the MetricsCollector instance, or null if not registered.

name: mfs
desc: Returns the Mutable File System (MFS) manager.

name: onNewContent
desc: Returns a Stream of new content CIDs added to this node.

name: peerID
desc: Returns the peer ID of this node.

name: peerId
desc: Returns the peer ID of this node.

name: pin
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the given cid is pinned to prevent it from being garbage collected.

name: pinnedCids
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to a List of CIDs currently pinned by this node.

name: plugins
desc: Returns the Plugin manager.

name: publicKey
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the public key of this node as a base64 encoded protobuf.

name: publish
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the node publishes a message to a PubSub topic.

name: publishIPNS
desc:
Returns a Future that resolves to the IPNS name (base36-encoded peer ID)
published for the given cid.

name: pubsubMessages
desc: Returns a Stream of incoming PubSubMessages for all subscribed topics.

name: reprovider
desc: Returns the periodic Reprovider service, if DHT is enabled.

name: requestBlock
desc: Returns a Future that completes when a specific block associated with cid is requested from a peer via Bitswap.

name: resolveDNSLink
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the CID corresponding to the given domainName via DNSLink.

name: resolveIPNS
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to the CID corresponding to the IPNS name.

name: resolvePeerId
desc: Resolves a peerIdStr to its known multiaddresses.

name: restart
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the IPFS node has restarted by performing a stop and then a start.

name: router
desc: Returns the RouterInterface used for networking, or null if not available.

name: securityManager
desc: Returns the SecurityManager.

name: setGatewayMode
desc: Sets the mode for retrieving content.

name: start
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the IPFS node and all its subsystems have started.

name: state
desc: Returns the current state of the node.

name: stop
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the IPFS node has stopped gracefully, releasing all resources.

name: subscribe
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the node subscribes to a PubSub topic.

name: unpin
desc: Returns a Future that resolves to true if the given cid was successfully unpinned from IPFS.

name: unsubscribe
desc: Returns a Future that completes when the node unsubscribes from a PubSub topic.

name: IPFSWebNode
desc: A minimal IPFS node for web browsers.

name: IPFSWebNode.new
desc: Creates a new web IPFS node.

name: add
desc: Adds data and returns its CID.

name: addFile
desc: Adds a file to IPFS using chunked streaming.

name: addStream
desc: Adds data from a stream and returns the root CID.

name: bitswap
desc: Access to Bitswap handler.

name: bootstrapPeers
desc: List of bootstrap peers (WebSocket URLs) to connect to on startup.

name: cat
desc: Gets data by CID object.

name: get
desc: Gets data by CID string.

name: isRunning
desc: Whether the node is running.

name: listPins
desc: Lists all pinned CIDs.

name: peerID
desc: The node's peer ID.

name: pin
desc: Pins a CID (marks it as persistent).

name: publishIPNS
desc: Publishes an IPNS record.

name: pubsub
desc: Access to PubSub client.

name: resolveIPNS
desc: Resolves an IPNS name.

name: securityManager
desc: Access to security manager.

name: start
desc: Starts the web node.

name: stop
desc: Stops the web node.

name: unpin
desc: Unpins a CID.

name: IndexBuilder
desc: Builder for CAR v2 index payloads.

name: IndexBuilder.new
desc: Creates an IndexBuilder with the given multihashSorted format flag.

name: add
desc: Records a new section at offset with the given cid.

name: build
desc: Builds and returns the sorted index payload bytes.

name: multihashSorted
desc: Whether to build a MultihashIndexSorted index.

name: MetricsConfig
desc: Configuration options for telemetry and metrics collection.

name: MetricsConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a MetricsConfig from a JSON map.

name: MetricsConfig.new
desc:
Creates a metrics configuration with the given options.
Creates a new MetricsConfig with the given collection options.

name: collectNetworkMetrics
desc: Whether to collect network bandwidth and peer metrics.

name: collectStorageMetrics
desc: Whether to collect disk and block storage metrics.

name: collectSystemMetrics
desc: Whether to collect CPU and memory metrics.

name: collectionIntervalSeconds
desc: How often metrics are collected, in seconds.

name: enablePrometheusExport
desc: Whether to expose metrics via Prometheus endpoint.

name: enabled
desc: Whether metrics collection is enabled.

name: prometheusEndpoint
desc: The HTTP path for Prometheus metrics.

name: toJson
desc: Converts this configuration to a JSON map.

name: NetworkConfig
desc: Network configuration for the IPFS node.

name: NetworkConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a network configuration from a JSON map.

name: NetworkConfig.new
desc: Creates a network configuration with the given options.

name: NetworkConfig.withGeneratedId
desc: Creates a network configuration with the given options and a generated Peer ID.

name: bootstrapPeers
desc: Peers to connect to on startup.

name: circuitRelay
desc: Circuit relay client configuration.

name: connectionTimeout
desc: Timeout for connection attempts.

name: defaultBootstrapPeers
desc: Default IPFS bootstrap peers.

name: defaultIpniEndpoints
desc: Default IPNI endpoints used when no custom endpoints are configured.

name: defaultListenAddresses
desc: Default multiaddr listen addresses for TCP.

name: defaultReframeEndpoints
desc: Default Reframe endpoints used when no custom endpoints are configured.

name: delegatedRoutingEndpoint
desc: Optional HTTP endpoint for delegated routing.

name: enableMDNS
desc: Whether to enable mDNS for local peer discovery. Defaults to true.

name: enableNatTraversal
desc: Whether to enable NAT traversal (UPnP/NAT-PMP). Defaults to false for security.

name: enableQuic
desc: Whether to enable the native QUIC transport.

name: enableWebRtc
desc: Whether to enable WebRTC.

name: enableWebTransport
desc: Whether to enable WebTransport.

name: ipniEndpoints
desc: Optional IPNI endpoints for content routing.

name: listenAddresses
desc: Addresses to listen on for incoming connections.

name: maxConnections
desc: Maximum number of concurrent connections.

name: nodeId
desc: Unique identifier for this node.

name: preferQuic
desc: Whether to prefer QUIC over TCP when dialing a peer that advertises both.

name: privateNetworkPsk
desc: The 32-byte pre-shared key loaded from swarmKeyPath.

name: quicListenPort
desc: UDP port the QUIC transport will listen on when enabled and available.

name: quicMaxStreams
desc: Maximum number of concurrent QUIC streams per connection.

name: reframeEndpoints
desc: Optional Reframe endpoints for delegated routing.

name: stunServers
desc:
STUN servers for WebRTC ICE negotiation. Default is empty; no
production STUN servers are hardcoded.

name: swarmKeyPath
desc: Optional path to a libp2p private-network swarm key file.

name: toJson
desc: Converts the network configuration to a JSON map.

name: turnServers
desc: TURN servers for WebRTC relay fallback. Default is empty.

name: NodeState
desc: Represents the possible states of an IPFSNode.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: ProtocolConfig
desc: Configuration for a specific protocol.

name: ProtocolConfig.new
desc: Creates a new ProtocolConfig.

name: maxRetries
desc: Maximum number of retries per message.

name: messageTimeout
desc: Timeout for individual messages.

name: protocolId
desc: The protocol identifier.

name: PubSubMessage
desc: Represents a message published on a PubSub topic.

name: PubSubMessage.new
desc: Creates a PubSub message.

name: content
desc: The message content.

name: sender
desc: The sender's peer ID.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: topic
desc: The topic this message was published to.

name: SecurityConfig
desc: Security-related configuration options for IPFS node

name: SecurityConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a SecurityConfig from a JSON map.

name: SecurityConfig.new
desc: Creates a new SecurityConfig with default encryption and rotation settings.

name: denylistCompactFormat
desc: Whether the denylist source uses the BadBits-style compact format.

name: denylistDefaultAction
desc: Default action for denylist hits: "block" or "log".

name: denylistPath
desc: Local file path or HTTP(S) URL to the denylist source.

name: denylistRefreshInterval
desc: Interval between automatic denylist refreshes.

name: denylistStoragePath
desc: Optional local path for a persistent cached copy of the denylist.

name: dhtDifficulty
desc: SEC-005: Static PoW difficulty for DHT Sybil protection (number of zero bits)

name: enableDenylist
desc: Whether the operator-controlled content denylist is enabled.

name: enableKeyRotation
desc: Whether to enable key rotation

name: enableRateLimiting
desc: Whether to enable request rate limiting

name: enableTLS
desc: Whether to enable TLS for secure communication

name: keyRotationInterval
desc: Key rotation interval

name: maxAuthAttempts
desc: Maximum number of authentication attempts

name: maxRequestsPerMinute
desc: Maximum requests per minute

name: tlsCertificatePath
desc: The path to the TLS certificate file

name: tlsPrivateKeyPath
desc: The path to the TLS private key file

name: toJson
desc: Converts this configuration to a JSON map.

name: StorageConfig
desc: Configuration options for IPFS storage.

name: StorageConfig.fromJson
desc: Creates a StorageConfig from a JSON map.

name: StorageConfig.new
desc: Creates a new StorageConfig with default paths and limits.

name: baseDir
desc: Base directory for all IPFS data

name: blockPath
desc: Computed path to the block storage directory.

name: blocksDir
desc: Directory for block storage

name: datastoreDir
desc: Directory for datastore

name: datastorePath
desc: Computed path to the datastore directory.

name: enableGC
desc: Whether to enable garbage collection

name: gcInterval
desc: Garbage collection interval

name: keysDir
desc: Directory for keys

name: keysPath
desc: Computed path to the keys directory.

name: maxBlockSize
desc: Maximum size for a single block

name: maxStorageSize
desc: Maximum storage size in bytes

name: toJson
desc: Converts this configuration to a JSON map.

name: TurnServer
desc: Configuration for a TURN server used by WebRTC ICE.

name: TurnServer.fromJson
desc: Creates a TurnServer from a JSON map.

name: TurnServer.new
desc: Creates a new TurnServer.

name: credential
desc: Credential (password) for TURN authentication.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: toJson
desc: Converts this server to a JSON map.

name: url
desc: TURN URL, e.g. turn:turn.example.com:3478.

name: username
desc: Username for TURN authentication.
